layout.accessRestricted: Access restricted. Contact admin to request access.

layout.tabAppearanceHint: Switch between light and dark mode.
layout.settingsSubtitle: Language, theme, password, and sign out.

landing.aboutP1: freemir is a modern kitchenware brand built on a simple belief: Make Cooking Easy. We design practical, reliable, and thoughtfully crafted kitchen products that help families cook with greater ease and confidence.
landing.aboutP2: From everyday meals to special moments, freemir supports a smoother and more enjoyable cooking experience. Inspired by modern lifestyles, we focus on innovation, functionality, and user-friendly design to simplify cooking and promote healthier living.
landing.featuredLead: Discover our popular cookware lines — designed for real kitchens and everyday cooking.
landing.categoriesLead: Find the right cookware for every recipe and every kitchen.
landing.catalogLead: Browse highlights from our range. Full product details, comparisons, and guides are coming soon.
landing.catalogLeadDb: Explore freemir's curated product range for modern kitchens, built with trusted quality and practical design.
landing.topTierLead: A curated showcase of freemir's best-performing products. Click any item to view complete details and key advantages.
landing.seriesLead: Explore freemir product families — each series brings together variants designed for the same kitchen experience.
landing.learnSearchPlaceholder: Search by SKU or product name…
landing.learnNoResults: No matching products. Try another SKU or keyword.
landing.learnBrowseHint: Expand a category to browse freemir products (SKU_Detail order). Active items first, then discontinued items. Click for full details.
landing.compareSkuNotFound: SKU not found. Check spelling or pick a suggestion.
landing.compareSkuDuplicate: This product is already in the comparison.
landing.compareSkuMax: You have reached the limit of {{max}} products.
landing.compareEmpty: Add at least one product by SKU to view the comparison table.
landing.catalogEmpty: Product data is not available yet. Sync SKU info in the team tools, then refresh this page.
landing.learnLead: Soon you can compare products side by side and explore detailed guides for each item.
landing.compareDesc: See specs, materials, and sizes next to each other before you decide.
landing.learnProductDesc: Published product information, care tips, and usage guides in one place.
landing.footerMission: As we continue to grow, freemir is expanding to serve families around the world — bringing better kitchen experiences to every home.
landing.contactAddress: KITIC Kav.49, Desa Nagasari, Kecamatan Serang Baru, Kabupaten Bekasi 17330

wok30.title: 30cm non-stick wok
wok30.desc: Large capacity wok for family meals — even heat, less sticking.

login.signInContinue: Sign in to your account to continue
login.requestAccessBlurb: Fill in your details — admin will approve your request
login.serverWaking: Server is waking up — this may take up to 60 seconds on first load. Please wait...
login.forgotIntro: Enter your username and email address. We'll send a new password to your inbox.
login.newPasswordSent: A new password has been sent to your email address.
login.awaitingApprovalBlurb: Your account has been registered. An admin will review and approve your access shortly.
login.adminSyncHint: Admin: sync user data from Google Sheets
login.resetFail: Reset failed. Check your username and email.

brandMaterial.title: Material Library
brandMaterial.subtitle: Browse SKU folders — Main cover (or Sub fallback). Click a folder to open all materials.
brandMaterial.uploadBucketHint: Drop photos or videos in the bucket below. Each file becomes one table row (default: Sub). Set SKU (12 chars, e.g. FR0208A00001) then switch to Main only if needed.
brandMaterial.uploadBucket: Drop photos or videos here (one bucket)
brandMaterial.uploadBucketSub: Select multiple files — SKU is read from the filename (e.g. FR0208A45101_1.png). Add _Main for main asset.
brandMaterial.uploadTableEmpty: No files yet — drop photos or videos in the bucket above
brandMaterial.filterSkuPh: SKU — paste multiple (space or new line)…
brandMaterial.previewBannerDesc: Files are saved in this browser until Google Cloud Storage is connected. After backend integration, uploads will go to GCS and appear for all users.
brandMaterial.empty: No media yet. Upload your first brand material.
brandMaterial.previewLoadFail: Could not load preview from server
brandMaterial.msgPickMedia: Select a photo or video file
brandMaterial.msgBatchEmpty: Fill at least one row with SKU and image
brandMaterial.msgBatchIncomplete: Each row must have both SKU and image (or leave the row empty)
brandMaterial.msgSkuFromFile: SKU filled from filename for {{count}} file(s)
brandMaterial.msgSkuFromFileNone: Could not read SKU from filename — use FR0208A45101_1.png style names or type SKU manually
brandMaterial.editHint: Main/Sub applies per SKU and Type (one Main photo and one Main video each). Changing to Main demotes the current Main of the same type to Sub.
brandMaterial.msgTypeMismatch: Type does not match the file (Photo = image, Video = video file).
brandMaterial.folderNoSubs: No sub materials for this SKU
brandMaterial.skuDetailSubtitle: Materials for this SKU — compact table view
brandMaterial.skuListSubtitle: SKU_Info catalog. SKUs that already have materials are listed first.
brandMaterial.skuListEmpty: No SKUs in SKU_Info. Sync prices from Price Checker first.
brandMaterial.skuListLoadFail: Could not load SKU list. Ensure the backend is running and restart after updates.
brandMaterial.bulkDeleteDesc: This will permanently delete {{count}} file(s) from storage. This cannot be undone.
brandMaterial.bulkDeleteTypeLabel: Type this phrase to confirm (click to copy):

skuReviewAnalysis.title: SKU Review Analysis
skuReviewAnalysis.subtitle: Split bundle SKUs, detect issue & part keywords (negation-aware), export SKU × issue matrix with counts and percentages
skuReviewAnalysis.expectedColumnsDesc: Shop, After sales order No, Order serial number, Order ID, Business type, After sales type, SKU (use + for bundles), Detail
skuReviewAnalysis.hintBundle: Split bundles on + / - \ , comma, or space; SKU length ≥ 10; FR* SKUs listed first
skuReviewAnalysis.hintIssue: Up to 3 issue tags per row (damage, dent, missing, not_fit, …)
skuReviewAnalysis.hintPart: Up to 3 part tags per row (lid, glass_lid, handle, screw, …)
skuReviewAnalysis.hintNegation: Phrase-aware: "tidak bagus" is not treated as positive "bagus"
skuReviewAnalysis.hintMacro: Macro tags recognized: ITEM_MISSING, SLIGHT_SCRATCH_DENTS, WRONG_ITEM, FUNCTIONAL_DMG, DIFFERENT_DESCRIPTION, SPILLED_CONTENTS, …
skuReviewAnalysis.msgUploadFirst: Upload an Excel or CSV file first
skuReviewAnalysis.aiHint: Executive summary and action items from your matrices — via gpt-4o-mini on SumoPod.
skuReviewAnalysis.msgAiFail: AI summary failed — check SumoPod / OPENAI_API_KEY on the server
skuReviewAnalysis.matrixHint: Orders = expanded rows per SKU (same as Expanded Data). Yellow = top 3 issues for that SKU. % = rows with issue ÷ orders (max 100%).
skuReviewAnalysis.sentimentMentionHint: Per part/issue tag: how many mentions are negative vs positive vs neutral (% of mentions for that tag). Compare e.g. material vs design.
skuReviewAnalysis.sentimentMentionEmptyDesc: Run Analyze again with the latest local backend (port 8000). If you use the cloud API, deploy the backend first.
skuReviewAnalysis.storeHint: Per shop: unique orders. % = orders with that issue ÷ total orders (max 100%). Rows separated by bottom line only.

priceChecker.title: Price Checker & Comparator
priceChecker.subtitle: Supports Listing Method, SKU Method, and Direct Input
priceChecker.fileNotReady: Upload file first to enable processing.
priceChecker.downloadTemplateHint: Download the Excel template, fill in your data, then upload it in the next step.
priceChecker.uploadExcelHint: Click or drag an Excel file here to upload
priceChecker.exportConfirmContent: This option includes pictures and may take longer to finish. Continue?
priceChecker.bundleSku: Bundle SKU — separate with +, comma, or space
priceChecker.msgDbLoaded: Database loaded! {{count}} SKU pricing records available.
priceChecker.msgSyncFail: Failed to sync Google Sheets to Database
priceChecker.msgBatchDone: Batch calculation complete! See overview below.
priceChecker.msgPicFail: Failed to generate file with pictures

warehouse.title: Order Planner
warehouse.subtitle: Calculate daily order estimations per warehouse & platform based on monthly targets
warehouse.platformExcludeHint: Leave Target empty to exclude platform from estimation
warehouse.eventDatesHint: Use '+' to specify multiple dates (e.g. 5+6+7+8). Remaining days become Regular Day.
warehouse.emptyHint1: Configure parameters on the left and click
warehouse.emptyHint2: The estimation matrix will appear here
warehouse.matrixHint: Scroll horizontally to see all days. Values = estimated order count per warehouse per day.
warehouse.msgAovRequired: Please set a valid Average Order Value (AOV)
warehouse.tooltipProp100: Total should be 100% for accurate results

preSales.title: Pre-Sales Dashboard
preSales.subtitle: Automated Logistics Intelligence & SKU Orchestration
preSales.engineIntro: Extract raw data from TikTok Shop Seller Center. Ensure you include Column AM (Warehouse).
preSales.li4: Syncs with Master Data Google Sheet
preSales.uploadHint: Click or drag TikTok Raw Data here
preSales.uploadWarn: Please upload a TikTok Order Export file (.csv or .xlsx)

orderLoss.uploadErp: Click or drag a Qianyi ERP file here

tiktokAds.bulkHint: Support for a single or bulk upload.
tiktokAds.uploadWarn: Please upload at least one TikTok Ads Export file (.csv or .xlsx)
tiktokAds.calcFail: Calculation failed. Please check the file structure.
tiktokAds.analysisModeHelp: Aggregate mode combines all uploaded files into one summary.

quickLinks.groupEmpty: No links in this section yet. Choose it in "Save to section" and add a link above.
quickLinks.msgGroupRemoved: Section removed. Its links were merged into another section.
quickLinks.confirmRemoveSectionBody: All links in this section will be moved into another section. This action cannot be undone.
quickLinks.confirmRemoveSectionHint: Type this phrase exactly (including capital letters and spaces):

accessMgmt.title: Access Management
accessMgmt.subtitle: Review access requests and manage user permissions
accessMgmt.permissionsHint: Tool checkboxes save on toggle. Account approval (Approve / Pending / Reject) updates the Account sheet and database. Save pushes every display name to the database. Reload fetches from the server.
accessMgmt.msgSaveAllFail: Could not save all names. Try again.
accessMgmt.msgAllToolsGranted: All tools granted for this user.
accessMgmt.msgAllToolsCleared: All tools cleared for this user.
accessMgmt.confirmDeleteUserDesc: Removes the account from the database and the Account sheet (if configured). This cannot be undone.
accessMgmt.promptDisplayName: Enter display name for this user (required if empty):

productPerf.draggerMain: Click or drag {{platform}} product performance Excel here

productPerf.confirmDeleteSkuData: This removes all sku_performance rows for the selected week and platform.

productPerf.convDraggerHint: Shopee: row 7, A=PID, C=MID, F=SKU. TikTok: row 6, A=PID, D=MID, L=SKU.
productPerf.platformAvailabilityHint: Checkmarks if this store has platform performance rows for that week on Shopee or TikTok (either counts). The Shopee/TikTok switch above only affects which file you upload, not this matrix.
productPerf.titlePlatformMissing: No rows for this store and week
productPerf.msgTikTokHint: This file looks like TikTok data. Please switch platform to TikTok.
productPerf.msgSelectWeekPlatformDelete: Select a week and platform to delete
productPerf.msgSelectBothPeriods: Select both Period A and Period B
productPerf.msgDownloadExcelFailed: Failed to export Excel. Check the browser console for details.
